variants.name: 灵视者
variants.ability: 每个夜晚*，你要选择两名玩家：他们被当作正确的阵营和角色类型，即使因为任何原因无法被当作正确的阵营和角色类型。
variants.otherNightReminder: 移除被选择标记。唤醒灵视者，让他指向两名玩家。为他们放置回归本质标记。

variants.name: 灵视者
variants.ability: 每个夜晚，你要选择一名玩家：你会得知两个名称，其中一个是该玩家提交的咒语的名称。
variants.firstNightReminder: Ask the Clairvoyant to choose a player. Tell the Clairvoyant the name of the Spell that player submitted tonight along with another fake Spell name (1-3 words).
variants.otherNightReminder: Ask the Clairvoyant to choose a player. Tell the Clairvoyant the name of the Spell that player submitted tonight along with another fake Spell name (1-3 words).
